Artist · Painter · Drawing Teacher

Guiding students of all ages in discovering their own creative voice — through pencil, brush, colour and clay. Personal and group classes now open in Kolkata.

Book a Class See the Work
About

Teaching art, patiently.

Somnath Karmakar is a visual artist and educator with years of experience in sketching, portrait drawing, watercolour painting and terracotta craft. He has guided students of all ages — from first-time beginners to award-winning young painters — in developing their own artistic voice.

He trained formally in fine arts and music, studied at the University of Calcutta, and holds technical training in computer & graphics design — a mix that shows up in both his teaching and his own studio work.

"A passionate artist and dedicated educator guiding students in discovering their creative expression through sketching and painting."

Independent Artist

Proud moments

Young artists, real results

Many of Somnath's students sit the Pracheen Kala Kendra, Chandigarh fine arts examinations each year — and come away with First Divisions and Distinctions to show for it.

Join in

Classes & how they run

one-on-one

Personal Class

Focused, individual sessions paced to the student — ideal for beginners, exam preparation, or anyone wanting close guidance.

  • Pencil drawing & sketching
  • Portrait practice
  • Watercolour & acrylic painting
  • Art & craft, including terracotta

Schedule and fees shared on enquiry — get in touch below.

every week

Group Class

A weekly group session — one day a week — for students who enjoy learning and creating alongside others.

  • Guided weekly projects
  • Peer feedback & group critique
  • Exam-track option (Pracheen Kala Kendra)
  • All skill levels welcome

Schedule and fees shared on enquiry — get in touch below.
